Definition: Length of 5th toe compared to length of 3rd toe (5<3, 5~3, 5>3)
Degree of webbing based on how high toe webs reach on the 5th toe (none, basally webbed, well webbed)
Whether or not finger webbing is present
Tympanum diameter relative to eye diameter (¼, ⅓, or ½)
Type of connection between scapula and procoracoid, either ligamentous or cartilaginous (from literature)
Whether the pupil is horizontal (from literature)
Whether or not teeth are present
Whether two horizontal palatal folds in front of the pharynx are present
A description of call type (from literature)
The ratio of finger pad width to toe pad width (either measured [numerical] or found in literature [described])
